User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the IILM Connect application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

userType.description: Type of user (student, faculty, alumni, admin).

StudentProfile.title: StudentProfile
StudentProfile.description: Represents a student profile in the CollabNest portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentProfile entity.

FacultyProfile.title: FacultyProfile
FacultyProfile.description: Represents a faculty profile in the CollabNest portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FacultyProfile entity.

AlumniProfile.title: AlumniProfile
AlumniProfile.description: Represents an alumni profile in the CollabNest portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AlumniProfile entity.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a post in the CollabNest portal.

likedBy.description: Array of user IDs who liked the post.

image.description: URL of an image attached to the post.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment on a post.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.
Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents attendance record for a student in a specific class.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance entity.

isPresent.description: Indicates if the student was present.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Class entity.

MessMeal.title: MessMeal
MessMeal.description: Represents a meal offered in the mess.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MessMeal entity.

date.description: Date when the meal is offered.

StudentMealSelection.title: StudentMealSelection
StudentMealSelection.description: Represents a student's selection of meal portions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentMealSelection entity.

portion.description: Portion size selected by the student.

MessStaffConsumptionData.title: MessStaffConsumptionData
MessStaffConsumptionData.description: Represents the data of prepared and consumed quantities of each meal item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MessStaffConsumptionData entity.

preparedQuantity.description: Quantity of the meal item prepared by the staff.

consumedQuantity.description: Quantity of the meal item consumed by students.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

isRead.description: Indicates if the notification has been read.

definition.description: Stores user information. Each document represents a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores alumni profile information. Each document contains alumni-specific details.

definition.description: Stores posts in the CollabNest portal. Includes 'authorId' for authorization.

params.description: The unique identifier for the post.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure is designed to support the IILM Connect application, encompassing LMS, CollabNest, and Mess portals. It prioritizes Authorization Independence and QAPs. User data and profiles are stored under the `/users/{userId}` path. Profile information (`StudentProfile`, `FacultyProfile`, `AlumniProfile`) will be stored as separate documents, each with a `userId` field referencing the corresponding user document. This enables easy retrieval of profile information based on user ID. The CollabNest portal's posts and comments are structured under `/posts/{postId}` and `/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}`, respectively. Posts include an `authorId` field to link back to the user who created the post. Tags are stored in a flat `/tags` collection, and posts contain an array of `tagIds` to establish a many-to-many relationship. The LMS portal's attendance records and class information are stored under `/classes/{classId}/attendances/{attendanceId}` and `/classes/{classId}`, respectively. Classes have a `teacherId` to link to the faculty member teaching the class, with attendance records linked to both the student and the class. The mess portal data, including meals, student selections, and staff consumption data, are stored under `/mess_meals/{mealId}`, `/mess_meals/{mealId}/student_selections/{selectionId}`, and `/mess_meals/{mealId}/staff_consumption_data/{consumptionDataId}`, respectively.  This structure provides granular access control and avoids the need for complex `get()` calls in security rules. For Authorization Independence, all subcollections include the necessary authorization context (e.g., `authorId` in `posts`, `teacherId` in `classes`). QAPs are supported through structural segregation (separate collections for different data types) and path-based ownership (e.g., `/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificationId}`).
